directory.meta_description: Partners, users, organizations and web of trust

establishments.empty_subtitle: No establishments match the selected filters

form.no_access: Only the owner can edit this organization
form.building_or_point: Or click the map to set a point manually

users.empty_partners_desc: Invite friends or add users to partners
users.login_required: Log in to see your partners
users.login_required_desc: You need to be logged in to view your partner list

invite_modal.title: Invite a Friend
invite_modal.regenerate_confirm: Create a new invite link? The old one will stop working.

organizations.empty_filtered: No organizations found with selected type
organizations.empty_all: No registered organizations in the system yet

notifications.already_member: You are already a member of this organization

organizations.leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave "{name}"?
organizations.terms_acceptance_text: I have read and agree to the association statutes and commit to uphold its provisions.

act_as.payment_address_help: Create a wallet at glow-app.co and paste the Spark address here.

directory.landing_meta: Community-verified business and organization directory. Map search, reviews and transparent governance. Free and open-source.
directory.landing_hero_subtitle: Discover businesses and organizations verified by the community. Search on the map, read real reviews and join local organizations.
directory.landing_problem_1: Business directories controlled by companies selling positions in search results
directory.landing_problem_2: Fake reviews with no identity verification
directory.landing_problem_3: No transparent governance — who runs the organization?
directory.landing_feature_1_desc: Click on buildings to see all businesses inside. Search by address, category or name
directory.landing_feature_2_desc: Only verified users (WoT 2+) can create listings — no spam, no fake businesses
directory.landing_feature_3_desc: 1-5 star reviews by verified users. Each review shows the author's verification level
directory.landing_feature_4_desc: Board, treasurer and auditor publicly visible. Members can join and participate
directory.landing_feature_5_desc: Companies, cooperatives, associations, NGOs, communities, condominiums — all organization types
directory.landing_feature_6_desc: Open-source, no paid listings, no ads. Civic infrastructure, not a product
directory.landing_how_1: Search for businesses and organizations by name, category or location
directory.landing_how_2: Read verified reviews and see the management team
directory.landing_how_3: Join organizations or create your own
directory.landing_free_desc: A fair directory should not cost money or sell positions. Parahub is by the community, for the community.

wot.progress_needed: You need {count} more verification{plural} to be fully verified

verifiers.title: People Who Verified Your Identity
verifiers.empty_desc: Ask trusted community members to verify your identity

verified.title: People You Have Verified
verified.empty_desc: Help build trust by verifying people you know

search.title: Verify Someone's Identity
search.search_label: Search by HNA, CRI, or Email

verify_modal.title: Verify Identity
verify_modal.notes_placeholder: Add any additional notes about the verification...
verify_modal.warning: By verifying this person, you are taking responsibility for their identity. False verifications may damage your reputation.

notifications.revoke_confirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this verification?

wot.verify_info_desc: By verifying this user, you confirm that you have met them in person or through trusted channels and vouch for their identity.
wot.verify_warning_desc: Your verification is a public statement. You are confirming this person's real identity through the chosen method.
wot.method_video_call_desc: Verified via video call (Zoom, Jitsi, Matrix)
wot.method_documents_desc: Verified passport, ID, or notarized documents
wot.method_vouched_desc: Recommended by someone I trust who met them
wot.statement_review_title: You are signing the following statement:
wot.signature_info_desc: This statement will be signed with your PGP key and publicly visible. Anyone can verify the authenticity of your signature.
wot.error_no_pgp_key: You need a PGP key to verify other users.
wot.error_no_pgp_key_redirect: You need to create a PGP key first. Go to profile settings now?
wot.photo_review_desc: Compare this photo with the person you are verifying. Confirm that it matches.
wot.photo_confirm_match: I confirm this photo matches the person I am verifying
wot.no_verification_photo: This user hasn't uploaded a verification photo yet. They must upload one before they can be verified.
wot.photo_reconfirmation: This user's photo was recently changed. {count}/3 re-confirmations received.
wot.error_no_verification_photo: Target user must upload a verification photo before WoT verification
